title: configure-module input
description: Configuration of the Mail Webhooks module

mongodb_url.title: MongoDB connection URL
mongodb_url.description: MongoDB connection string for webhook data storage

webhooks_collection.title: Webhooks collection name
webhooks_collection.description: MongoDB collection name for storing webhook configurations

jobs_collection.title: Jobs collection name
jobs_collection.description: MongoDB collection name for storing job queue data

logs_collection.title: Logs collection name
logs_collection.description: MongoDB collection name for storing webhook execution logs
